name: Nicodemus
title: Teacher by Night
oracleText:
Flash
When Nicodemus enters the battlefield, scry 2.
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, you gain 2 life.
flavorText: "Rabbi, we know that thou art a teacher come from God." — John 3:2
notes: Example John card object for Demo folder. This is a first-pass draft showing the expected project card shape.
